description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a formal, military-inspired uniform with elaborate details. The uniform features a double-breasted jacket adorned with gold trim, epaulets, and decorative cords, as well as red and gold cuffs. The figure wears tall, structured boots and a peaked cap with a prominent visor and insignia. The face is stern and clean-shaven, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The overall appearance is authoritative, with a rigid, upright posture and a sense of discipline.
description: A male adult in a formal, decorated military-style uniform with a peaked cap, tall boots, and gold-trimmed details, standing upright.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the peaked cap, structured jacket, and tall boots.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the uniform's gold trim, decorative cords, and stern facial expression.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, displaying the same uniform details and upright stance.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the jacket, epaulets, and the cap's shape.
attribute_clothing_type: formal military-style uniform with double-breasted jacket, epaulets, decorative cords, and peaked cap
